payload.Details:
Qualification: MBA (Marketing), PGDTM (Tourism Management), PhD (Advertising), FDP-IIM, Ahmedabad, UGC-NET Qualified.

Experience: 17 years of teaching experience.

Authored: 3 Books on Business Management and more than two dozen Research Papers Published in various National and International Journals of repute.

Select Publications: 

1. Email; advertising: A study of consumer attitude towards email advertising among Indian Consumers, Journal of Retail and Leisure Property, Springer, 
https://link.springer.com/article/10.1057/rlp.2009.10

2. Attitude towards SMS Advertising: A survey with reference to Indian Consumers, Journal of Internet Commerce, Taylor and Francis, https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/15332861.2012.729463?scroll=top&needAccess=true

3. How to enter paradise on earth: a case study of Aava, The Case Journal, Emerald,
https://www.emerald.com/insight/content/doi/10.1108/TCJ-08-2020-0105/full/html

4. Study of Perception towards E-mail Advertising vis-a-vis Conventional Advertising Among Indian Users, International Journal of Hospitality & Tourism Systems, Publishing India Group, https://www.proquest.com/openview/e839a44c08d2f7d80876c6306483768d/1?pq-origsite=gscholar&cbl=2030938

5. Towards Contingency Model of Technology Acceptance: Integrating Incident Method and Effective Literature Review to Explore the Factors Affecting Intention to Use Facebook Marketplace, IPE Journal of Management, IPE-Hyderabad

6. Facebook Advertising from the Young Users’ point of view, Academy of Marketing Studies Journal, Allied Business Academics, https://www.abacademies.org/articles/Facebook-advertising-from-young-users-point-of-1528-2678-25-6-497.pdf

7. Attitude and Behaviour of mobile phone users towards SMS advertising: A study in an emerging economy, Journal of Management Science
Vol 3(1), Geist Science, https://geistscience.com/papers/view/JMS1603105

8. Affiliate marketing Programs: A study of consumer attitude towards AMPs among Indian users, International Journal of Research Studies in Management, Consortia Academia, UK, http://consortiacademia.org/wp-content/uploads/IJRSM/IJRSM_v1i1/84-292-1-PB.pdf

9. Perception towards green marketing among Indian Youth: An Empirical Study, Kindler, Army Inst. of Management, Kolkata

10. Perception towards internet advertising: A study with reference to three different demographic groups, Global Business and Management Research: An International Journal (2012), http://www.gbmrjournal.com/pdf/Azeem%20and%20Haq,%202012.pdf

payload.OfficeAddress: Central University of Kashmir, Ganderbal, Jammu & Kashmir, India
payload.Details:
Dr. Insha Farooq is a gold medalist in both MBA and B.Com and currently serves as Senior Assistant Professor in the Department of Management Studies at the Central University of Kashmir. With over 12 years of teaching and research experience, her work focuses on sustainability, green marketing, consumer behavior, gender and entrepreneurship.

https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4403-3512

Research & Publications

She has published in reputed journals and presented at international conferences, including IIT Roorkee and IIM Bodhgaya. Her case study “Transition to Greener Ways at Parsa’s” is published by Emerald. She was Co-PI for an NCW-funded research project on domestic violence in Kashmir.

Teaching & Training

Courses taught include Business Research Methods, Operations Management, Consumer Behaviour, and Social Media Marketing. She integrates SPSS, Excel, and fieldwork into pedagogy. She has completed FDPs from IIM Jammu, IIM Kozhikode and holds certifications in Tableau and Python.

Leadership & Service

  • Academic Coordinator, Department of Management Studies
  • Member, Board of Studies & Academic Council (former)
  • Former Presiding Officer, Internal Complaints Committee, CUKashmir
  • Member Secretary, Soroptimist International Srinagar Kashmir
